# Chapter 6

## Invisible text

One way to hide text in the HTML is set the text to be transparent

:::{.invisible-text}

$$
\int_0^{\infty} x^2 \dx
$$

:::

The equation above was hidden.

The next line is also hidden.

:::{.invisible-text}

This line is hidden.

:::

There was a line before above this.

## Scrap that..

Actually let's go with a shortcode which looks like {{ hide start}} and {{ hide end }} etc.. then put the html and pdf code into the lua filter. To do.
